mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( rqst_no, title, cont, rqst_id, ins_dt, upt_dt, views, group_no, parent_no, depth, order_no, secret, password, board_type ) SELECT N.next_no, #{req.title}, CONCAT('[본문: ', #{req.scripture}, '] ', COALESCE(#{req.content}, '')), #{req.preacher}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{req.sermonDate} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NOW(), 0, N.next_no, NULL, 0, 0, 'N', NULL, 'ERP_SERMON' FROM ( SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT LPAD((MAX(CAST(rqst_no AS INTEGER)) + 1)::TEXT, 10, '0') FROM board WHERE rqst_no ~ '^[0-9]+$'), '0000000001' ) AS next_no ) N
